# PERF-71 positive: N+1 query pattern
lang: go
file: PERF-071-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Orders []Order
}

type Order struct {
	gorm.Model
	UserID uint
}

func ListUserOrders(db *gorm.DB) {
	var users []User
	db.Find(&users)
	for _, u := range users {
		var orders []Order
		db.Where("user_id = ?", u.ID).Find(&orders)
		_ = orders
	}
}
